title: helenium hirtum
intro: Helenium hirtum, also known as sticky sneezeweed, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Helenium hirtum include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant properties. Helenium hirtum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
